raw.message:
🇪🇸 BARCELONE vs A. MADRID 🇪🇸
Parie sur le meilleur du foot européen avec Betclic ! 🏆

hook.summary: Promotional offer for a Barcelona vs. Atletico Madrid football match with a 100€ bonus.
hook.visual_action: Animated soccer jerseys for Barcelona and Atletico Madrid appear side-by-side with betting odds and a pulsing bonus offer.

scene_flow: Matchup reveal between Barcelona and Atletico Madrid with team jerseys.
Betting odds for home win, draw, and away win are displayed.
Promotional offer of up to 100€ in freebets pulses at the top of the screen.
Legal gambling warnings and government logos remain static at the bottom.
audience_proxy: French-speaking sports enthusiasts interested in soccer betting and promotional bonuses.
